overview: A complete personal portfolio website for Maulya Soni, an AI/ML engineer and Full Stack developer, featuring 10 sections with animations, dark/light mode, and project showcase.
features: Sticky navbar with dark/light mode toggle and mobile hamburger menu
Hero section with typewriter effect cycling through roles and animated stats
Technical skills grouped as pill badges by category
6 project cards with filter tabs (All, ML, Gen AI, Web Dev)
Experience timeline, education cards, certifications section
Contact form with split layout and social links
